title: No Bat Spawning
description: Make bats actually stop spawning by remove them from spawning pool.
body:
## Description
While some datapacks I looked up is just killing them with a timer or spawning them with NoAI in the void, so I made myself a datapack remove them from spawning pool prevent them from spawning. And I'm willing to share this to community, and update them to higher versions.

### Latest news:
With the change of Minecraft 1.21.2, there is no longer incompatible with other pack that change world generation anymore.</br>
You can freely add without concerning about it alter world generation like berfore.</br>
**This mean the datapack has reach to its final stage and will no longer need any update.**</br>
_(Unless Mojang changing things again, which is unlikely)_


### For older version:
This datapack works on Forge, Fabric, Paper, Spigot,... However, I'm unsure if it conflicts with mods/plugins that alter world generation, as this adjustment may need to be done manually. If you wish to ensure compatibility with your mod, you may need to make the necessary adjustments yourself.
